title: Vir Biotechnology Provides Corporate Update and Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
text: Vir Biotechnology announced its first-quarter 2026 results on May 7, 2026, reporting significant progress across its pipeline and strengthening its financial position through strategic partnerships. The company will present Week 96 Phase 2 SOLSTICE data at the European Association for the Study of the Liver Congress in late May. Earlier results demonstrated strong efficacy: Undetectable hepatitis delta virus RNA was achieved and maintained by 77% of participants at Week 72, improving to 88% by Week 96. The company expects Phase 3 ECLIPSE 1 topline data in Q4 2026, with ECLIPSE 2 and 3 results anticipated in Q1 2027. VIR-5500, a prostate cancer-targeting therapeutic, achieved a major milestone through a closed collaboration with Astellas. The first patient was dosed in Phase 1 expansion cohorts, with pivotal Phase 3 trials anticipated in 2027. Positive Phase 1 monotherapy data showed dose-dependent anti-tumor activity and a well-tolerated safety profile. The company ended Q1 2026 with $809.3 million in cash and investments, excluding $315 million in combined upfront payments and equity investments from Astellas expected in Q2 2026. This runway is projected to fund operations into the second half of 2028. R&D Expenses: $108.9 million (down from $118.6 million year-over-year). Net Loss: $125.7 million, or $0.85 per share. Public Offering: The company raised $172.5 million gross proceeds.
